description_long: This stuffed toy depicts a monstrous creature with a bulbous, rounded body and two large, curved horns protruding from its head. Its skin is mottled brown with patches of red, simulating wounds or decayed flesh, giving it a grotesque and unsettling appearance. The face features a wide, toothy grin with sharp, jagged teeth and piercing blue eyes that stand out starkly against the darker tones. The surface appears textured and slightly shiny in places, suggesting a worn or distressed fabric. Several areas on the body are marked with red, raw-looking spots, enhancing the toy's eerie, horror-inspired design. The overall form is squat and heavyset, with no visible limbs, focusing attention on the head and facial features.
description: A grotesque, horned stuffed toy with mottled brown skin, red wounds, sharp teeth, and piercing blue eyes, evoking a monstrous or horror-inspired character.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face with wide, toothy grin, both blue eyes, and both horns prominently displayed.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the curve of the left horn, the profile of the snout, and several red wounds on the cheek and lower body.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head and body, with both horns extending outward and several red patches on the back.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the right horn, the side profile of the face, and additional red wounds on the cheek and body.
attribute_character_or_animal_represente: grotesque horned monster with blue eyes and sharp teeth
attribute_facial_expression: The facial expression is menacing, with a wide, jagged-toothed grin and intense, wide-open blue eyes that give a sinister and unsettling look.
attribute_pose_or_posture: The toy is in a squat, rounded posture with its head raised and horns pointing outward, lacking visible limbs.
